# Avatar

A user avatar component that displays a profile image, initials from a name, or a fallback icon.

## Import

```jsx
import { Avatar, AvatarGroup } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `Avatar` | A single avatar displaying an image, initials, or fallback. |
| `AvatarGroup` | A container for stacking multiple avatars together. |

## Props

### Avatar

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | `string` | - | The name used to generate initials as a fallback. |
| `src` | `string` | - | The image URL for the avatar. |
| `size` | `"2xs" \| "xs" \| "sm" \| "md" \| "lg" \| "xl" \| "2xl"` | `"md"` | The size of the avatar. |
| `variant` | `"solid" \| "subtle" \| "outline"` | `"subtle"` | The visual style variant. |
| `fallback` | `ReactNode` | - | Custom fallback content when no image or name is provided. |

### AvatarGroup

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `max` | `number` | - | Maximum number of avatars to display. Excess avatars show a "+N" indicator. |

## Usage

### Basic Avatar

```jsx
<Avatar name="John Doe" src="/images/john.jpg" />
```

### Avatar with Initials Fallback

```jsx
<Avatar name="Jane Smith" />
```

### Avatar Sizes

```jsx
<Avatar name="A" size="2xs" />
<Avatar name="B" size="xs" />
<Avatar name="C" size="sm" />
<Avatar name="D" size="md" />
<Avatar name="E" size="lg" />
<Avatar name="F" size="xl" />
<Avatar name="G" size="2xl" />
```

### Avatar Group

```jsx
<AvatarGroup max={3}>
  <Avatar name="Alice" src="/images/alice.jpg" />
  <Avatar name="Bob" src="/images/bob.jpg" />
  <Avatar name="Charlie" src="/images/charlie.jpg" />
  <Avatar name="Diana" src="/images/diana.jpg" />
</AvatarGroup>
```
